case_title: ASIA EVANS VS. JACQUELINE MARIE CORNELIUS

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY EVANS, ASIA AS TO DEFENDANT CORNELIUS, JACQUELINE MARIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-09-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EVANS, ASIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED NOV-17-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CORNELIUS, JACQUELINE MARIE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EVANS, ASIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORNELIUS, JACQUELINE MARIE $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CORNELIUS, JACQUELINE MARIE
